meaning: adj.吸引人的,哀诉似的,恳求似的
examples: There was an appealing gravity to everything she said.
'Would you really help?' he said with an appealing look.
What is it about Tom Hanks that cinema-goers find so appealing?
His conclusions are intuitively appealing, but they arise from the most casual of casual empiricism.
North Yorkshire Police are currently appealing for help to trace a laptop belonging to Ms Davison.
